heroHeadline: Korea: 4,000 Years of History, Democracy Under Scrutiny
heroSubtitle: From Gojoseon to the Constitutional Court — tracking the full arc of Korean civilization, conflict, and democratic consolidation.
footerNote: Data sourced from official government records, Yonhap News, academic institutions, and major international outlets. Historical figures from Samguk Sagi, Joseon Wangjo Sillok, and peer-reviewed scholarship.
